query:
UPDATE samples
             SET titulo = COALESCE($2, titulo),
                 slug = COALESCE($3, slug),
                 descripcion = COALESCE($4, descripcion),
                 tipo = $5,
                 metadata = COALESCE(metadata, '{}'::jsonb) || $6,
                 updated_at = NOW()
             WHERE id = $1
               AND eliminado_en IS NULL
